Title: German (de) - UI Translation
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- German language available in storefront language switcher
Steps:
[ACT] Open language switcher in header or footer and select German (de)
[WAIT] Wait for page to reload with de locale
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} homepage
[ASSERT] Verify main navigation labels are in German
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog (or equivalent category page)
[ASSERT] Verify page headings, filter labels, and button text are in German
[NAV] Navigate to a product detail page
[ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart button, product labels, and breadcrumb are in German
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account (if accessible)
[ASSERT] Verify account menu labels, form field labels, and section headings are in German
Assertions:
[DOM] Language switcher shows "de" or German flag as active selection
[DOM] Main navigation items render in German (not English)
[DOM] CTA buttons (e.g., Add to Cart, Checkout) display German text
[DOM] Form labels and placeholders are in German
[STATE] No English fallback text visible anywhere in the UI
[DOM] No raw translation keys (e.g., translation.button.add) visible
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No 404 errors for locale resource files (e.g., de.json)
[NETWORK] Locale file loaded successfully (HTTP 200)
Failure_Signals: English text visible in non-English UI;Translation key (e.g., translation.button.add) shown instead of text;Mixed-language UI (some elements in English some in German)
Cleanup: Switch language back to English (en) via language switcher

Title: German (de) - BOPIS Modal

Title: English (en) - Baseline
Preconditions: - English language set (default storefront language)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} homepage with English locale active
[ASSERT] Verify English is the default language on first load
[NAV] Navigate through homepage, catalog, PDP, and account sections
[ASSERT] Verify all UI elements display readable English text
[ASSERT] Verify no raw translation keys are visible anywhere
[ASSERT] Verify no missing translation placeholders (empty labels or blank buttons)
Assertions:
[DOM] Language switcher shows English (en) as active by default
[DOM] All navigation items, buttons, and labels render in complete English
[STATE] No raw translation keys (e.g., translation.button.add) visible anywhere
[DOM] No blank or empty text nodes where translated content is expected
[DOM] All text is readable and grammatically complete
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No 404 errors for en locale resource file
[NETWORK] en.json (or equivalent) locale file loads with HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Translation key (e.g., translation.button.add) shown instead of text;Blank or empty labels where text is expected;English marked as unavailable in language switcher
Cleanup: No cleanup required — English is the default state

Title: Currency Switcher Visible
Preconditions: Store configured with multiple currencies enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} homepage
[ASSERT] Check the header area for a currency switcher control
[SCROLL] Scroll to the footer if currency switcher not found in header
[ASSERT] Verify currency switcher is present in header or footer
[ACT] Click or tap the currency switcher
[WAIT] Wait for the currency list to open
[ASSERT] Verify list of available currencies appears
[ASSERT] Verify the currently active currency is visually indicated as selected
[ASSERT] Verify all store-configured currencies are listed (minimum: USD, EUR)
[KEY] Press Tab to navigate to the currency switcher
[ASSERT] Verify the currency switcher is reachable and operable via keyboard
Assertions:
[DOM] Currency switcher control is visible in header or footer
[DOM] Clicking/tapping the switcher opens a list of available currencies
[STATE] Current active currency is shown as selected in the list
[DOM] All store-configured currencies listed — minimum USD and EUR present
[DOM] Currency switcher is reachable via keyboard Tab navigation and operable via Enter/Space
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart price query returns amount in selected currency
[CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors when opening currency switcher
Failure_Signals: Currency switcher not visible in header or footer;Switcher opens but shows empty list;Active currency not highlighted in the list;Currency switcher not keyboard accessible
Cleanup: Switch currency back to USD

Title: Switch to EUR
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Store configured with USD and EUR, currently displaying USD
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a product category page showing prices in USD
[ASSERT] Note a product price displayed in USD (e.g., $100.00) as baseline
[ACT] Open the currency switcher
[ACT] Select EUR from the currency list
[WAIT] Wait for prices to update on the current page
[ASSERT] Verify all product prices on the category page now display in EUR
[ASSERT] Verify the currency symbol changed from $ to the euro symbol
[NAV] Navigate to the cart page (if items are present in cart)
[ASSERT] Verify cart line item prices are in EUR
[ASSERT] Verify cart total is in EUR
[ASSERT] Verify mini-cart header shows EUR amounts
Assertions:
[DOM] All product prices on category page convert to EUR after selection
[DOM] Currency symbol changes from $ to euro symbol
[DOM] Cart line item prices and totals shown in EUR
[DOM] Mini-cart header reflects EUR amounts
[MATH] Exchange rate applied consistently — all prices on the page reflect the same rate
[STATE] USD prices no longer visible after switching to EUR
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart price query returns amount in selected currency
[CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors during currency switch
[NETWORK] No failed requests when prices are re-fetched in EUR
Failure_Signals: prices revert to USD after navigation;Currency symbol not updating after switch;EUR symbol not displayed (raw "EUR" text shown instead)
Cleanup: Switch currency back to USD

[STATE] EUR prices shown on product detail page
[STATE] Currency preference persists across page navigation — no reversion to USD
[STATE] Currency preference persists after browser page refresh
[STATE] No reversion to USD on navigation or refresh
Cross_Layer_Checks:

[CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors related to currency state persistence

Failure_Signals: prices revert to USD after navigation;EUR not persisted after page refresh;Currency selection lost on navigation to a different section

Title: Checkout in Selected Currency
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation page

[NETWORK] Payment request payload contains EUR currency code
Failure_Signals: prices revert to USD after navigation;Currency mismatch between checkout and order confirmation;Order History showing USD instead of EUR for the placed order

Title: Currency Symbol Display
Preconditions: Store configured with USD, EUR, and GBP currencies
Steps:
[ACT] Set currency to USD via the currency switcher
[NAV] Navigate to any product page
[ASSERT] Note the currency symbol and number format displayed (expected: $1,234.56)
[ACT] Set currency to EUR via the currency switcher
[NAV] Navigate to the same product page
[ASSERT] Note the euro symbol and number format displayed (expected: euro symbol with locale-appropriate formatting)
[ACT] Set currency to GBP via the currency switcher
[NAV] Navigate to the same product page
[ASSERT] Note the pound symbol and number format displayed (expected: pound symbol with locale-appropriate formatting)
[ASSERT] Compare symbol placement for each: verify correct prefix or suffix position per currency locale convention
[ASSERT] Verify no raw currency code (USD, EUR, GBP) is displayed as a substitute for the symbol
Assertions:
[FORMAT] USD: $ symbol as prefix, format $1,234.56
[FORMAT] EUR: euro symbol displayed, format follows locale convention (e.g., 1.234,56 euro symbol or euro symbol 1,234.56 depending on locale)
[FORMAT] GBP: pound symbol as prefix, format follows locale convention
[DOM] Symbol placement correct for each currency — prefix or suffix as per international convention
[DOM] No raw currency ISO code (USD/EUR/GBP) displayed instead of the currency symbol
[FORMAT] Decimal and thousands separators correct per currency locale for each of the three currencies
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart price query returns amount in selected currency
[CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors related to Intl.NumberFormat during currency formatting
[NETWORK] Currency symbol data loaded correctly for all three currencies
Failure_Signals: prices revert to USD after navigation;Raw currency code (e.g., USD) shown instead of symbol;Symbol on wrong side (e.g., 1,234.56$ instead of $1,234.56);Separators incorrect for the selected currency
Cleanup: Switch currency back to USD
